Off Calendar Jun-03-2009 Continued To Jun-17-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lisa Chow for Gregory Stec. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Guardian.

Mr. Ferdon stated that the Public Administrator understood that the best interest for the estate was to have Ms. Chow's client appointed as the estate needed an accounting which could not be done by the Public Adminstrator in a timely manner. The Court appointed Gregory Stec as the Administrator, (order to be signed upon review). The Court denied Ms. Chow's request to file the supplemental declaration under seal as there were no moving papers to support the request.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Wong.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-08-2008 Continued To Oct-15-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Sancimino for Gregory Stec. Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator.

Ms. Sancimino stated that Bernice Stec is the mother/beneficiary of David Stec, that her client, Gregorey Stec, is the son of Bernice Stec and brother to David Stec, that Bernice Stec is incapacitated and her client is acting under a durable power of attorney, and that Stephen Stec has given consent for his brother to act as administrator. In addition, she stated that she knows that the Public Administrator has priority; however, she requests the Court appoint her client. Mr. Ferdon stated that he had hoped to receive a more detailed declaration about how things were working to date. The Court continued the matter to October 15, 2008 for counsel to confer.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera.
